title: fix devenv module output
description: currently the turnkey devenv module is exposed as part of the flake.flakeModules output. This is confusing as flakeModules are for flake-parts modules, which this module is not. Instead, let's output it in a different flake.devenvModules output
close_reason: Separated module outputs: flakeModules.turnkey for flake-parts module, devenvModules.turnkey for devenv module. Updated CLAUDE.md documentation.
